ops.text: During the 0.15.0 deploy smoke (2026-07-14) the laptop's synckitd serve log was continuously spamming `reposync list: /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-pushback: not a repo` — a tracked registry entry whose checkout is missing or not a git/jj repo, re-logged on every List call. Pre-existing (not a 0.15.0 regression), but it drowns the serve log; either the entry should be tombstoned (`reposync repo rm` run from ~/Code) or the checkout restored, and the never-drop-a-repo lenient logging should arguably rate-limit to once per daemon generation.
